subcodes.title: Commentary on the revelation of the Lawh-i-Karmil
subcodes.first_line: That spot which became the Most Great Scene, after the advent and descent therein of the Ancient Beauty, glorified be His majesty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اینکه آنمقر منظر اکبر واقع بعد از ورود و نزول جمال قدم جل اجلاله در آنمحل
subcodes.subjects: @modes; manner; speed; size of divine revelation, @Shrines and Holy places
